import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut start = 0
mut last: Option<String> = None

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 10
      let line = string.substring(input, start, i)
      if not string.is_empty(string.trim(line))
        last = Some(line)
      end
      start = i + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if start < n
  let tail = string.substring(input, start, n)
  if not string.is_empty(string.trim(tail))
    last = Some(tail)
  end
end

match last
when Some(line)
  println(line)
when None
  println("(none)")
end
